text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This plushie is so cute and quite comforting to
hold.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It reminds me of the teddy bear my parents gave
to me when I was quite young...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should have my parents send her to me.
It would be nice to display them both
side-by-side.
